name: lifecycle-validate
description: Select and run the deterministic validation path for lifecycle work.

arguments.name: spec_id
arguments.description: Optional active spec package ID or path.

arguments.name: scope
arguments.description: Optional validation scope such as spec, prompts, archive, plugin, or closure.

instructions: Prefer MCP validation tools before direct scripts when they are available.
Report the validation commands or MCP tools used, diagnostics, and residual risk.
Do not mark tasks complete unless evidence is concrete and linked to the relevant task or closure gate.
client_support_recovery: If MCP tools are unavailable, run the matching spec_runtime.py scan, lint, prompts, archive-index, or closure-check command.
